Landing.title: Find your tutor
Landing.subtitle: Online lessons in languages, school subjects, IT, psychology and more — video, interactive whiteboard and chat on one platform.
Landing.heroSubtitle: Live online lessons: a convenient schedule, payment and chat with your tutor — all on one platform. 35+ subjects, from languages to IT.
Landing.categoriesSubtitle: From languages to sports — pick what you need
Landing.howSubtitle: Three steps — and your first lesson is on the calendar
Landing.how1Body: Compare tutors in the catalog by rating, price and reviews — find your match.
Landing.how2Body: Pick a free day and hour in the tutor's schedule.
Landing.how3Body: The lesson runs on the platform, and chat keeps you connected with your tutor.
Landing.topSubtitle: Recommended based on rating and real reviews
Landing.why1Body: Every tutor profile is reviewed before it appears in the catalog.
Landing.why2Body: Money goes through the platform — if a lesson doesn't happen, funds return to your balance.
Landing.why3Body: Only a student can leave a review after a completed lesson.
Landing.why4Body: If a question comes up, our support replies in both languages.
Landing.rev1Text: I found a tutor in a single evening. Lessons run right inside the platform — video and chat in one place, nothing to install.
Landing.rev2Text: I started with a free trial lesson. I liked the tutor and continued — the payment went through without a hitch.
Landing.rev3Text: I pick the schedule myself and get reminders before each lesson. Easy to fit around work.
Landing.rev4Text: Support replies in both Uzbek and Russian — that matters to me. Every question was solved quickly.
Landing.rev5Text: Reviews here are left only after real lessons, so the ratings are genuinely trustworthy.
Landing.rev6Text: My money is protected: when a lesson didn't happen, the funds returned to my balance right away.
Landing.teachersSubtitle: Create a profile — everything is ready for you to start teaching.
Landing.tBullet2: Wallet and payouts to your card
Landing.tBullet3: Catalog promotion with the PRO plan
Landing.faq1Q: How do I book a lesson?
Landing.faq1A: Open a tutor's profile, pick a convenient free slot and confirm the booking. The lesson will appear in your schedule.
Landing.faq2Q: How does an online lesson work?
Landing.faq2A: The in-platform video room is coming soon. For now, agree on the lesson format with your tutor in the platform chat.
Landing.faq3Q: What happens if I cancel a booking?
Landing.faq3A: If more than 12 hours remain before the lesson, the money is fully refunded to your internal balance. Later — no refund. If the tutor cancels, the money is always refunded 100%.
Landing.faq4A: A booking reserves the selected time for 15 minutes. Card payment is currently being connected by the project owner.
Landing.faq5Q: Is there a free trial lesson?
Landing.faq5A: Many tutors offer a free 20-minute trial lesson — once per tutor. Look for the 'Free trial' badge in the catalog.
Landing.faq6Q: How do I become a tutor?
Landing.faq6A: Sign up, fill in your profile, and add your subjects and prices. Details are on the 'Become a tutor' page.
Landing.finalSubtitle: Choose your tutor from hundreds of profiles — just open the catalog.

Pricing.metaDescription: Free and PRO: a subscription for tutors on USTOZ. No lesson commission — the student pays, the money goes to your wallet.
Pricing.title: Pricing for tutors
Pricing.subtitle: No lesson commission — the student pays and the money goes straight to your wallet. A subscription unlocks more subjects and catalog promotion.
Pricing.note: A student's payment always goes through the platform: if a lesson doesn't happen, the money returns to the balance.
Pricing.checkoutSoonNote: Online payment is being connected. Soon you'll be able to get PRO by card via Click, Payme or Uzum.

Footer.tagline: A marketplace of tutors and specialists for Uzbekistan: languages, school subjects, IT and more.

Errors.title: Something went wrong

Errors.notFoundDescription: This page doesn't exist or has moved. Find a tutor in the catalog instead.

Teacher.messageError: Couldn't send the message. Please try again.
Teacher.msgSentBody: The teacher will get a notification and reply in the chat.
Teacher.cancelNote: Cancellation is free if more than 12 hours remain before the lesson — the money returns to your balance.
Teacher.scheduleSubtitle: Pick a convenient time — booking takes a minute
Teacher.reviewsError: Couldn't load reviews. Please refresh the page.
Teacher.noReviewsBody: Be the first — after a lesson you'll be able to leave a review here.
Teacher.reviewsBasedOn: {count, plural, one {Based on # review} other {Based on # reviews}}
Teacher.reviewsPrivacy: Review authors are shown anonymously — we protect students' privacy.
Teacher.faqLessonA: The lesson runs online at the booked time. The in-platform video room is coming soon — for now, agree on the format and link with your tutor in the platform chat.
Teacher.faqCancelA: Yes. If more than 12 hours remain before the lesson, the money is refunded 100% to your internal balance. Later — no refund. If the tutor cancels, the money is always refunded in full.
Teacher.faqPrepareQ: What should I prepare for the lesson?
Teacher.faqPrepareA: A stable internet connection, a microphone and a camera are enough. Message the tutor about your goal in advance — the first lesson will be more productive.

SubjectPage.metaDescription: Experienced tutors: {subject}. Online lessons: convenient schedule, real reviews, free trial sessions. Choose by price and rating.
SubjectPage.intro: Learn '{subject}' online: experienced tutors, convenient prices, lessons right on the platform.
SubjectPage.found: {count, plural, one {# tutor found} other {# tutors found}}
SubjectPage.seoP1: On the USTOZ platform every tutor in the '{subject}' category lists their price, experience and lesson language. Reviews are left only after lessons that actually took place, so the ratings can be trusted.
SubjectPage.seoP2: To book a lesson, pick a free time in the tutor's profile. Many offer a free 20-minute trial — try the subject with no pressure.

BecomeTeacher.metaTitle: Become a tutor — teach on USTOZ
BecomeTeacher.metaDescription: Teach online on the USTOZ platform: your own schedule, a wallet with card payouts, chat with students. Sign-up is free.
BecomeTeacher.heroSubtitle: Create a profile and set your own prices and schedule. The platform handles bookings, chat and payment tracking.
BecomeTeacher.heroNote: Sign-up is free, the profile takes a few minutes to fill in.
BecomeTeacher.step1Body: Add your name, photo and a short note about your experience.
BecomeTeacher.step2Body: Mark the subjects you teach — you set the price yourself.
BecomeTeacher.step3Body: Mark which days and hours you're free.
BecomeTeacher.step4Body: Students book your free slots — you get a notification right away.
BecomeTeacher.give1Body: Mark your free windows — bookings only land in them.
BecomeTeacher.give2Body: Every lesson is tracked in your wallet; withdraw to a Humo or Uzcard card.
BecomeTeacher.give3Body: Message students before and after lessons right on the platform.
BecomeTeacher.give4Body: The PRO plan shows your profile higher in the catalog.
BecomeTeacher.req1: Your real first and last name
BecomeTeacher.req3: An honest description of your experience
BecomeTeacher.reqNote: Your profile appears in the catalog right after setup. Moderation keeps quality up — profiles that break the rules are removed.
BecomeTeacher.faq1Q: How much does it cost to work on the platform?
BecomeTeacher.faq1A: It's free. For those who want it, there's a PRO plan that shows your profile higher in the catalog.
BecomeTeacher.faq2A: Every completed lesson is credited to your wallet on the platform. From the wallet you request a payout to a Humo or Uzcard card.
BecomeTeacher.faq3Q: Does the platform take a commission on lessons?
BecomeTeacher.faq3A: No, there's no lesson commission — the platform earns from the optional PRO subscription.
BecomeTeacher.faq4Q: When will the first students come?
BecomeTeacher.faq4A: It depends on your profile, prices and reviews. A complete profile — with photo, video and a detailed description — gets more attention.
BecomeTeacher.faq5Q: Can I combine it with my main job?
BecomeTeacher.faq5A: Of course. You set the schedule yourself — even a few hours a week is enough.
BecomeTeacher.ctaSubtitle: Creating a profile takes a few minutes.

payments.title: Payments
payments.balanceNote: Refunds for cancelled lessons are kept here and used for your next bookings.
payments.topupNoCards: You don't have any saved cards yet.
payments.topupCardNote: Cards are bound via the payment provider with an SMS code from your bank. We never store the card number.
payments.cardOtpHint: Enter the SMS code from your bank
payments.cardDemoNote: Demo mode: no real charge or binding happens and card data is never sent anywhere. In production the card is entered on the provider's secure form, and the CVV is never stored.
payments.topupSelectCard: Select a card to top up.
payments.topupSuccessBody: The funds were added to your balance.
payments.topupFailed: Couldn't top up the balance. Please try again.
payments.topupTestHint: Test top-up is disabled. Enable test mode (payments_mode = test) in the project settings.
payments.topupSoonNote: Online payment (Payme / Click / Uzum / card) is being connected by the project owner. For now a booking waits 15 minutes for payment after it's created.
payments.onlineNote: Online payment (Payme / Click / Uzum) is being connected by the project owner. For now a booking waits 15 minutes for payment.
payments.emptyBody: Balance changes and payments will appear here.
